raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX XXXX I made a booking reservation with a company called ERG collection for a vacation home rental scheduled for XXXX XXXX XXXX. XXXX XXXX of {$6000.00} was made and booking agreement was signed. On XXXX XXXX I tried contacting the company and discovered their phone number was not working, website was no longer up, and I sent an email to cancel the reservation but the email returned to sender as domain name no longer exists. I contacted citi bank to dispute the charge and case was opened. On XX/XX/year> I received notice from Citi bank that dispute was resolved and customer is responsible. I submitted supporting documents to Citi bank with my original dispute and again on XXXX XXXX that included the booking agreement which showed cancellation policy that states, 100 % refund if cancellation is made more than XXXX  days prior to check in date, payment receipt, as well as the email I sent to the company requesting to cancel which was XXXX  days prior to check in date. I also sent picture showing the email was returned as domain name no longer exists. It is clear that I followed the cancellation policy, services were not rendered, and the merchant is unresponsive or defunct, yet the dispute was denied.
